prompt:
Create an image using the uploaded image.

Ultra-detailed, hyper-realistic, 3d pixar portrait of a young child, preserving the exact facial identity, structure, and proportions from the reference image with high fidelity.

Pose (must match exactly):
Child is sitting on the floor with legs crossed. One elbow is resting on the knee, with the hand supporting the side of the face (cheek pressed into palm). The other hand rests relaxed near the ankle or shin. Head slightly tilted forward. Expression is mildly annoyed, pouting, or bored with furrowed brows and subtle frown. Eye contact directed toward camera.

Body proportions:
Natural child proportions with slightly stylized softness. Maintain realistic anatomy, no exaggeration.

Face & expression:
Preserve original eye shape, nose structure, lips, and skin tone. Expression should reflect subtle frustration or impatience (pout, slight brow tension).

Hair:
medium to long natural hair, slightly tousled, soft volume

Clothing:
Casual modern outfit:
Random color long-sleeve sweater or similar soft fabric top
Denim jeans (rolled cuffs optional)
Clean white sneakers

Lighting:
Soft studio lighting, evenly diffused, gentle shadows under chin and body, smooth skin rendering without over-processing.

Background:
Minimal clean studio backdrop (light grey or soft neutral tone), seamless and distraction-free.

Details:
Highly detailed skin texture, realistic fabric folds, natural hair strands with subtle flyaways, crisp focus, 8k resolution feel.

Camera:
Eye-level perspective, centered framing, shallow depth of field but subject fully sharp.

Vertical portrait composition, full frame height emphasis, cinematic poster layout.
